creator: vijaychandilya@gmail.com
text:
The wireless card keeps fading in and out of a connection. I have Intel 2200BG with the iwi driver. The 3 messages that keep coming on screen:

iwi0: firmware stuck in state 4, resetting
iwi0: device timeout
iwi0: firmware error

How-To-Repeat: When I boot the computer, I always had this problem.
